query: My partner and I are planning a 5-day trip from Munich to Vienna from July 10th to 14th, 2026. We have a total budget of €1,200. We enjoy visiting museums, trying local food, and exploring the city on foot. Please suggest accommodations and a daily itinerary.

description: Normal case: family with two children
query: We are a family of 4 (2 adults, a 4-year-old and a 10-year-old) flying from Berlin to Barcelona from August 1st to 8th, 2026. Our budget is €3,500. We want a family-friendly apartment or family room, enjoy the beach, sightseeing, and trying local restaurants. Please plan our trip.

description: Normal case: solo business trip, no budget limit

hard_constraints.interests: business meetings, efficient transport, good restaurants for client dinners

query: I need to travel from Frankfurt to New York for a business trip from June 15th to 17th, 2026. No strict budget — company covers it. I need a central business hotel, a direct or short-connection flight, and restaurant recommendations suitable for client dinners.

description: Normal case: group of friends, long-haul to Tokyo

hard_constraints.accommodation: hotel or hostel with shared common areas
hard_constraints.interests: anime, street food, nightlife, temples, technology, pop culture

query: Six of us are flying from Munich to Tokyo from September 20th to 30th, 2026. Our total group budget is €9,000. We are all in our late 20s and love anime, Japanese street food, exploring temples, and experiencing the nightlife. We prefer a hotel or hostel with shared spaces so we can hang out together. Please plan the trip.

hard_constraints.accommodation: overwater bungalow or luxury beach resort
hard_constraints.interests: snorkelling, diving, romantic dinners, spa, relaxation, private beach

query: My partner and I are going on our honeymoon to the Maldives from October 10th to 20th, 2026. We have a budget of €8,000 and want a luxury overwater bungalow or high-end beach resort. We love snorkelling, diving, spa treatments, and romantic sunset dinners. Please plan the full trip including flights from Berlin.

description: Normal case: senior couple, cultural trip to North Africa

hard_constraints.interests: souks, history, architecture, local cuisine, guided tours, relaxed pace

query: My husband and I (both in our mid-60s) would like to visit Marrakech from July 5th to 12th, 2026, flying from Hamburg. Our budget is €2,500. We enjoy history, architecture, local food markets, and would love a stay in a traditional riad. We prefer a relaxed pace with guided tours rather than rushing around. Please suggest an itinerary.

description: Normal case: solo backpacker, long-haul, tight budget

hard_constraints.interests: hiking, wildlife, local culture, surf, budget travel, meeting people

query: I am travelling solo from Munich to Cape Town for 3 weeks from June 1st to 21st, 2026. My total budget is €2,000 including flights. I will stay in hostels, love hiking (Table Mountain, Cape Point), wildlife, and surfing. I want to experience local culture and meet other travellers. Please help me plan this trip on a tight budget.

description: Normal case: couple, short weekend city break, Northern Europe

hard_constraints.interests: design, architecture, New Nordic cuisine, cycling, museums

query: My partner and I want a quick weekend getaway from Cologne to Copenhagen from June 6th to 8th, 2026. Budget is €800 for two. We are into Scandinavian design, architecture, and New Nordic food. We would love a stylish boutique hotel and recommendations for the best restaurants and design museums.

description: Edge case: no flight, but overseas route (Germany to Ireland via car and ferry)
query: I want to travel from Frankfurt to Dublin from September 5th to 10th, 2026, without taking any flights — I prefer to travel by car and ferry. My budget is €800. I am travelling solo and looking for a hostel or cheap hotel. I love hiking, coastal landscapes, and visiting local pubs.

description: Edge case: extremely tight budget, solo traveller

hard_constraints.interests: free attractions, street food, city history, budget travel

query: I am travelling solo from Stuttgart to Prague from June 20th to 23rd, 2026 on a very tight budget of only €250 total. I am happy to stay in a shared hostel dorm. I prefer to travel by bus or carpooling rather than flying. I am interested in free or cheap attractions, street food, and the historical old town. Please plan the most budget-efficient trip possible.

description: Edge case: traveller is already at the destination, only needs remaining days planned

hard_constraints.interests: Roman history, street food, Colosseum, Trastevere, hidden gems

query: I am already in Rome for a business trip and have 3 unexpected free days from July 5th to 8th, 2026. No flights or hotel needed — I already have both. I have €400 to spend on activities, food, and experiences. I love Roman history, street food, and discovering hidden gems off the tourist trail. Please suggest the best way to spend these 3 days.

description: Special interest: astronomy and dark sky tourism

hard_constraints.accommodation: rural house or small hotel near observatory
hard_constraints.interests: stargazing, astronomy, dark sky reserves, observatory visits, hiking

query: I am a solo traveller flying from Hamburg to La Palma in the Canary Islands from November 12th to 19th, 2026. My budget is €1,500. I am passionate about astronomy and stargazing — I specifically want to stay near the Roque de los Muchachos observatory. Please suggest accommodation in a dark sky area, stargazing tours, and hiking options.

description: Special interest: strictly vegan diet and sustainable travel

hard_constraints.interests: vegan restaurants, sustainability, cycling, vegan markets, eco-friendly activities

query: My partner and I are travelling from Cologne to Amsterdam from October 3rd to 6th, 2026. Budget is €900 for two. We follow a strictly vegan diet and only want to eat at vegan or fully plant-based restaurants. We prefer sustainable, eco-certified accommodation. We love cycling, vegan food markets, and eco-friendly activities. Train travel is preferred over flying.

description: Special interest: wheelchair user, full accessibility required throughout

hard_constraints.accommodation: fully accessible hotel with roll-in shower and lift
hard_constraints.interests: Gaudí architecture, accessible beaches, local food, accessible museums

query: I am travelling with my partner from Munich to Barcelona from September 5th to 10th, 2026. I am a wheelchair user and need full accessibility throughout — wheelchair-accessible flights and seating, a hotel with a roll-in shower and lift access, and activities reachable by wheelchair. Budget is €2,000. We love Gaudí architecture, accessible beaches, and local food. Please plan a fully accessible trip.

description: Impossible case: car transport from Germany to New Zealand in 4 days (physically impossible)

hard_constraints.interests: nature, hiking, Maori culture, scenic landscapes

query: I want to drive from Hamburg to Auckland, New Zealand from July 10th to 14th, 2026. Budget is €2,000. I love nature, hiking, and experiencing Maori culture. Please plan the trip including the route and accommodation.
